object.name: replaceManagedBotToken
object.description: Use this method to revoke the current token of a managed bot and generate a new one. Returns the new token as String on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to revoke the current token of a managed bot and generate a new one. Returns the new token as String on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to revoke the current token of a managed bot and generate a new one. Returns the new token as *String* on success.

annotations.description: User identifier of the managed bot whose token will be replaced
annotations.html_description: User identifier of the managed bot whose token will be replaced
annotations.rst_description: User identifier of the managed bot whose token will be replaced
annotations.name: user_id
